spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. The platform must feel like an exclusive club, not a cluttered spreadsheet.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-[#B5952F] transition-all rounded-sm px-8 py-4
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-black transition-all rounded-sm px-8 py-4
buttons.ghost: text-white hover:text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-white/5 transition-all rounded-sm px-6 py-3

cards.standard: bg-[#121212] border border-[#27272A] p-6 hover:border-[#D4AF37]/50 transition-colors
cards.glass: bg-[#121212]/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-[#D4AF37]/20 p-8 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]
cards.highlight: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#1A1A1A] to-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#D4AF37] p-8 relative overflow-hidden

inputs.standard: bg-[#050505] border border-[#27272A] text-white focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] rounded-sm px-4 py-3

tables.header: text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-zinc-400 border-b border-zinc-800 pb-4

specific_design_patterns.currency_formatting: Always use Indian formatting (₹ with lakh/crore commas, e.g., ₹2,50,000 or ₹1,00,00,000). Never use USD or Western million/billion formatting.
specific_design_patterns.genealogy_tree_view: Must be rendered on a pure black background (#050505). Nodes should be dark circular or pill shapes with a 1px solid gold border (#D4AF37). Active/Premium members should have a subtle gold drop-shadow. Connecting lines must be solid #D4AF37 at 40% opacity. Include a zoom/pan wrapper. Avoid generic boxy org-charts; it should look like an elite network.
specific_design_patterns.gold_accents: Do not overuse gold. Gold is for values (earnings), primary actions (CTAs), and active states. 90% of the UI should be dark gray, black, and white.
specific_design_patterns.icons: Use lucide-react with stroke-width 1.5. For key metric icons (e.g., wallet, team), use the primary gold color.

landing.hero: Dark cinematic hero. Large Cabinet Grotesk H1. Subtitle with strong value proposition. CTA: 'Buy Product Kit'. Use abstract gold texture image as a subtle background.
landing.plan_explainer: Bento grid explaining the ₹10,000 Product Kit, 24-month cashback, and 3 referral incomes.
landing.income_tables: Minimalist dark tables showing Direct Referral, Level Income, and Team Sales. Emphasize the ₹ percentages with gold text.
landing.rewards_milestones: Vertical timeline or tiered cards. Highlighting the 25 recruits -> ₹5,000 bonus -> up to ₹100Cr.
landing.product_kit_cta: Large split section: High-end image of the 18 agro products kit on the left, purchase details and gold CTA on the right.

auth.layout: Split screen. Left: Abstract gold geometric image. Right: Login/Register form.
auth.fields: Sponsor Referral Code (mandatory for register), Name, Email, Password. Minimal inputs, focus on borders and gold highlights.

user_dashboard.kpis: Top row of 4 cards: Current Wallet Balance (large gold text), Next Payout Date, Total Direct Referrals, Team Profit.
user_dashboard.quick_actions: Copy Referral Link (with icon), Withdraw Funds, View Tree.
user_dashboard.recent_activity: Mini-table showing recent referral signups or cashback drops.

genealogy_tree.layout: Full width/height dedicated view. Left/Right binary structure clearly visible.
genealogy_tree.node_details: Hovering a node shows their rank, total sales, and active status.

income_history.layout: Tabs for: All, Direct, Level, Team, Cashback, Salary.
income_history.data: Data-heavy table. Columns: Date, Source (User/Level), Amount (Gold), Status. Use Shadcn Tabs.

shop.layout: Grid of products. Dark background. Images should have a subtle dark overlay that lifts on hover.
shop.product_card: Image, Title, Category, Price, 'Add to Cart' button (ghost until hover).
shop.banners: Buy 1 Get 1 / Festive offers highlighted in gold-bordered feature boxes.

admin_dashboard.metrics: System-wide stats: Total Users, Total Revenue, Total Payouts Pending.
admin_dashboard.tables: Users, Products, Categories, Offers, Orders, Payouts.
admin_dashboard.controls: Approve payouts, manage tree nodes, set system configurations.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme with gold accents. Do not introduce any other colors (e.g., no blue, purple, or green unless for specific success/error states).
Use Cabinet Grotesk for all headings. Install via standard web fonts if necessary, or map to a similar system font if unavailable, but prefer importing it.
Implement Indian currency formatting strictly across all modules (e.g., ₹1,00,000).
For the Binary Tree view, implement a custom visualization using a library like react-flow or D3, stylized heavily with black backgrounds and gold nodes.
In the User Panel, emphasize the ₹10,000 kit and the 24-month cashback. It should feel like a premium investment dashboard.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Do not use generic 'Card' components from Shadcn without customizing them to match the dark/gold aesthetic (e.g., changing borders to #27272A and backgrounds to #121212).
